episodes.title: From Cult Control to Hollywood & Advocacy: Reclaiming An Identity - Dar Dixon
episodes.description:
What happens when your identity is stripped away—piece by piece—and you’re left to rebuild yourself from the inside out?

In this deeply moving episode of the Bring Your Big Energy podcast, Stacey K sits down with Dar Dixon—award-nominated actor, producer, director, and survivor of both the Iranian Revolution and a dangerous doomsday cult—for a powerful conversation about identity, resilience, and reclaiming personal freedom.

Dar shares how surviving political upheaval, enduring years of psychological manipulation, and ultimately escaping a cult shaped his sense of self and his mental health. He opens up about the subtle, gradual nature of undue influence, the painful loss of identity that comes with leaving a cult, and the long road back to autonomy. 

Along the way, Dar reveals how acting became a form of therapy, storytelling became a way to reclaim his voice, and purpose emerged from the space between who he was and who he became.

Using the SPARK framework as a backbone, this conversation explores:
* How identity fractures during trauma and manipulation
* Why the “space between identities” is the most vulnerable—and transformative—place to be
* The role of belonging, denial, and intuition in cult dynamics
* How resilience is built one choice at a time
* How storytelling fuels healing, advocacy, and social justice

This episode isn’t about shock value. It’s about reclamation. It’s about rebuilding a life with intention, courage, and truth—and proving that even after profound loss, it’s possible to step back into your power.

✨ This is Big Energy in its rawest, most honest form.
